title: Kapag Puno Na Ang Salop...
overview: Sergeant Isagani Guerrero is on a mission to expose a corrupt judge and bring him to justice. He is working tirelessly to gather evidence and uphold the law.

trailers.title: Ligtas na sana kayo! Si FPJ pa talaga tinambangan nyo! | Kapag Puno na ang Salop | Fernando Poe Jr.
